def solve(nums, target)
    n = nums.length

    # Helper function to generate map of {xor_sum: max_subset_size} for a segment
    def generate_map(arr)
        # Map initialized with the empty set: XOR sum 0, size 0
        map = {0 => 0}
        
        l = arr.length
        # Iterate through all 2^l - 1 non-empty subsets
        (1..(1 << l) - 1).each do |i|
            xor_sum = 0
            size = 0
            
            # Check which elements are included in the subset represented by i
            (0...l).each do |j|
                if (i >> j) & 1 == 1
                    xor_sum ^= arr[j]
                    size += 1
                end
            end

            # Update the map if we found a larger subset size for this xor_sum
            current_max = map[xor_sum] || -1
            if size > current_max
                map[xor_sum] = size
            end
        end
        map
    end

    # Handle N=0 case, though constraints say N >= 1
    if n == 0
        return target == 0 ? 0 : -1
    end

    # 1. Split the array
    mid = n / 2
    a = nums[0...mid]
    b = nums[mid...n]

    # 2. Process A and B
    map_a = generate_map(a)
    map_b = generate_map(b)

    # 3. Combine results
    max_total_size = -1

    map_a.each do |xor_a, size_a|
        # We need xor_b such that xor_a ^ xor_b = target
        xor_b_required = target ^ xor_a

        if map_b.key?(xor_b_required)
            size_b = map_b[xor_b_required]
            total_size = size_a + size_b
            if total_size > max_total_size
                max_total_size = total_size
            end
        end
    end

    # 4. Calculate minimum removals
    if max_total_size == -1
        return -1
    else
        return n - max_total_size
    end
end

    n = nums.length
    if n == 0
        return target == 0 ? 0 : -1
    end

    mid = n / 2
    a = nums[0...mid]
    b = nums[mid...n]

    # Helper function to generate Map: {xor_sum => max_subset_size}
    def generate_map(arr)
        # Initialize with empty set: XOR sum 0, size 0
        map = { 0 => 0 }
        len = arr.length
        
        # Iterate through all subsets represented by masks from 1 up to 2^len - 1

            xor_sum = 0
            size = 0
            
            # Check bits of i
            (0...len).each do |j|
                if (i >> j) & 1 == 1
                    xor_sum ^= arr[j]
                    size += 1
                end

            current_max = map.fetch(xor_sum, 0)
            if size > current_max

            end
        end
        map
    end
    
    map_a = generate_map(a)
    map_b = generate_map(b)

    max_total_size = -1

    # Combine results

    end

    if max_total_size == -1
        return -1
    else
        return n - max_total_size
    end
end
